spacing_and_layout.marketing_page: Generous spacing (py-24 to py-32), 'Tetris' grid layout, high asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: 'Control Room' Grid layout. Dense padding (p-6) inside cards. Direct grid children for widgets.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for buttons/inputs.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat background with 1px border-white/5, subtle shadow, hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_micro_themes.navigation_bar: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10

components.inputs: bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-white focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500
components.kanban_board: Columns with bg-zinc-900/30 border border-white/5. Draggable cards with solid background
components.tables: shadcn/ui table. Hover effects on rows. Text-zinc-300.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards MUST have distinct hover states (lighter backgrounds or slight translateY).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Framer motion for page transitions and card staggering.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark green texture to be used as a subtle background element in hero sections, with high opacity overlay.

professionals_working.description: Nighttime office meeting for marketing page 'Teams' feature section.

feature_image.description: Professionals focused on tasks. Used in SaaS product features representation.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g. data-testid='login-submit-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet APCA contrast over dark backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React application (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS.
Implement mock data context/localStorage for auth, distinguishing Admin, Sales Manager, Sales Executive.
Create dashboards inside `/dashboard/*` with role-based routing.
Ensure dark mode is default and prominent. Use the exact Emerald green (#10B981) for primary actions.
Include Kanban board, charts (recharts/shadcn), and dense data tables.
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance and tab transitions.
Import Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in your HTML/CSS.
